details.test: Task 1: Registration Saturday-only with guest and vegetarian meal
Task 2: Update profile with Denver, long bio, three interests, classmates-only visibility
Task 3: Classmate directory search by ZIP and add first five to favorites
Task 4: Volunteer shifts selection with total duration between 2 and 3 hours
Task 5: Seating overview with favorite classmates and seat reservation when possible
Task 6: Scholarship Fund donation between 30 and 50 with amount-only visibility
Task 7: Build personal schedule with filtered in-person events and verify My Schedule
Task 8: Select recommended hotel under 150 with free breakfast within 2 miles and save trip
Task 9: Discussion board memory post and replies to band/yearbook topics
